title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
title_cn: 7 月 20 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent crude jumped after the US and Iran escalated hostilities, including the targeting of vessels attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz and an attack on a key oil facility in Kuwait over the weekend.

summary: Oil climbed to the highest level in over a month and the dollar strengthened after US and Iranian attacks escalated over the weekend, adding to pressure on Asian markets already rattled by a slump in chip stocks.

title: Bond Traders Take Warsh at Word, See Inflation Fight Continuing

title: Caspian Pipeline Consortium Halts Loadings on Drone Strike

title: Tropical Storm Watches Posted Across Florida’s Panhandle Region

summary: A tropical storm watch has been issued for the Florida Panhandle as the Atlantic’s next event takes shape off shore.

title: Extreme Stock Swings Tempt Funds Into Reverse Dispersion Trade
title_cn: 极端的股票波动吸引资金进行反向分散交易
summary: Betting that individual stocks will be volatile while the S&P 500 stays relatively calm has been a popular and successful hedge fund strategy. But with the swings in share prices reaching extreme levels, the reverse trade is gaining traction with investors.

title: Prediction Markets Swell to 27% of Sports Bets During World Cup
title_cn: 世界杯期间预测市场占体育博彩的 27%
summary: Prediction-market trading has surged during a blowout World Cup, far outpacing the growth at traditional sportsbooks and driving home the competitive threat that companies like Kalshi now pose to the sports-gambling industry.

title: Safest Carry in Emerging Markets Is in Latin American Currencies
title_cn: 新兴市场最安全的持有方式是拉丁美洲货币
summary: Emerging-market currency volatility has dropped to the lowest since the start of year and that’s re-energizing carry trades, particularly those involving Latin America that are seen to offer the juiciest returns.

title: Singapore Eyes Hedge Fund Tax Cuts to Boost Hub Role: FT
title_cn: 新加坡着眼于对冲基金减税以提升枢纽地位：金融时报
summary: The Monetary Authority of Singapore has held talks with investment firms on reducing taxes for fund managers in a bid to maintain the island’s competitiveness and retain talent, the Financial Times reported.

title: South Korea Details Plan to Make Won Freely Tradable Abroad
title_cn: 韩国详细介绍了韩元在海外自由交易的计划
summary: South Korea laid out a detailed plan to make the won freely tradable among foreigners, its boldest step yet to liberalize the forex market and bring the currency closer to full convertibility.

title: Jingye Says It Reserves Legal Rights in UK Steel Nationalization
title_cn: 敬业称保留英国钢铁国有化的合法权利
summary: Jingye Steel Co. has reserved all legal rights, including international arbitration, over the UK government’s nationalization of British Steel.

title: Venezuela’s Official Earthquake Death Toll Rises to 5,119
title_cn: 委内瑞拉官方地震死亡人数上升至 5,119 人
summary: The official death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela last month rose to 5,119, according to National Assembly head Jorge Rodríguez.

title: The Brewing Battle Between Netflix and YouTube Over Creators
title_cn: Netflix 和 YouTube 正在酝酿争夺创作者之战
summary: Netflix is doing deals with many of YouTube’s biggest stars. How will YouTube respond?

title_cn: 首席财务官称，竞争对手需求推动台积电在美国支出 2650 亿美元
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. is adding $100 billion to its investments in Arizona to meet strong demand from US customers and to ward off ambitious rivals, a senior executive said this week.

title: Teleperformance Wants Entire BPO Staff to Be AI-Enabled by 2027
title_cn: Teleperformance 希望到 2027 年所有 BPO 员工都支持 AI
summary: French business process outsourcing company Teleperformance SE plans to embed artificial intelligence in the workflow of its entire workforce of half-a-million people, speeding up adoption of the same technology that’s driving labor market disruption for the industry.

title: Moonshot Plans IPO in Six Months After China AI Breakthrough
title_cn: 中国人工智能取得突破后，Moonshot 计划在六个月内首次公开募股
summary: Moonshot AI has told investors it’s preparing to list in as early as six months, seizing the opportunity to tap capital markets after its latest model upended industry perceptions of China’s artificial intelligence capabilities and sent tech stocks reeling.

title: Why Apple’s OpenAI Lawsuit Doesn’t Mention Jony Ive; AI Recording at Genius Bar
title_cn: 为什么苹果的 OpenAI 诉讼没有提及 Jony Ive；天才吧AI录音
summary: Also: The company tries out AI recording for Genius Bar appointments.

title: Big Tech Needs to Justify AI Spending as Investors Dump Stocks
title_cn: 随着投资者抛售股票，大型科技公司需要证明人工智能支出的合理性
summary: After last week’s wipeout in chips and the broader selloff in technology stocks, pressure is building for the biggest spenders on artificial intelligence to justify their expenditures to beleaguered traders with increasingly itchy fingers hovering over their sell buttons.

title: Alibaba’s Qwen Unveils Preview of Flagship AI Model
title_cn: 阿里巴巴Qwen发布旗舰AI模型预览
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. launched a preview version of its flagship Qwen3.8 Max model, which it described as comparable to leading frontier AI models and second only to Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5.

title: Jackson on Track to Replace Platner as Maine Senate Nominee
title_cn: 杰克逊有望取代普拉特纳成为缅因州参议院候选人
summary: Troy Jackson, a former senior state lawmaker, is on track to secure the Democratic US Senate nomination in Maine, replacing Graham Platner, a progressive favorite who was pushed out of the race amid sexual assault allegations.

title: Trump Is Silent So Far on Iran Strategy as US Death Toll Hits 17
title_cn: 美国死亡人数已达 17 人，特朗普迄今对伊朗战略保持沉默
summary: If President Donald Trump knows where he wants to take the war in Iran, he’s giving little sign of it publicly.

title: Magyar Endorses Chess Great Judit Polgar for Hungarian President
title_cn: 马扎尔支持国际象棋大师朱迪特·波尔加竞选匈牙利总统
summary: Prime Minister Peter Magyar proposed chess legend Judit Polgar as Hungary’s next president, saying the country needs a head of state “every Hungarian can be proud of“ after the removal of Tamas Sulyok.

title: Burnham Vows Unity After Lightning Ascent to UK Premiership
title_cn: 伯纳姆在闪电般晋级英国英超后发誓团结一致
summary: Andy Burnham is set to become the UK’s seventh prime minister in just over a decade on Monday with a number of outstanding questions about who will be in his cabinet and the policy direction he will pursue.

title: Russia Hits Kyiv With Largest Ballistic Missile Barrage
title_cn: 俄罗斯以最大规模的弹道导弹袭击基辅
summary: At least one person was killed in what Ukraine’s foreign minister called the largest ballistic missile barrage aimed at Kyiv since the start of the Russia’s invasion more than four years ago.

title: Merz Sees Chance for Broader Cabinet Reshuffle After Spahn Exit
title_cn: 默茨认为斯潘退出后有机会进行更广泛的内阁改组
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the departure of the conservative bloc’s parliamentary group leader Jens Spahn has opened up the possibility of a broader government reshuffle.

title: Singapore Opposition Party’s Kenneth Jeyaretnam Dies at 67
title_cn: 新加坡反对党领袖 Kenneth Jeyaretnam 去世，享年 67 岁
summary: Kenneth Jeyaretnam, the leader of Singapore’s opposition Reform Party, has died. He was 67.

title: Hitler’s Birthplace Becomes Police Station to Keep Nazi Pilgrims Away
title_cn: 希特勒出生地变身警察局，驱赶纳粹朝圣者
summary: Austria will open a police station in the building where Adolf Hitler was born in 1889, aiming to end decades of public debate on how to prevent it from becoming a pilgrimage destination for far-right extremists.

title: Burnham to Scrap UK Digital ID to Focus on Cost of Living Policies
title_cn: 伯纳姆将废除英国数字身份证以专注于生活成本政策
summary: Andy Burnham will ditch plans for a government-issued digital ID for all British adults in a “reset of priorities” when he becomes prime minister on Monday.

title: Zelenskyy Tasks Political Novice to Get Ukraine Through Winter
title_cn: 泽伦斯基责成政治新手帮助乌克兰度过冬天
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is turning to a technocratic energy executive with no cabinet experience or political ties as his prime minister to prepare Ukraine to survive another winter of war.
